hotel_name: Khách sạn A25 Premium - 23 Quán Thánh (A25 Premium Hotel - 23 Quan Thanh)

reviews.title: Great location but small rooms, no car parking,
reviews.text: The hotel is very good location but inside all looks very old and not clean. Room's Facilities are poor. The receptionist is not very nice.
reviews.positives: Great location; good breakfast;

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Decent location helpful staff at the front desk.
reviews.negatives:
We went out one day for 8 hours and found that the cleaning staff had left our door open all day. 
All of our belongings were in an unsecured room. Very disturbing. The next day no cleaning. The day after they were there after 6:30 PM when we got home from dinner and had to wait for them to finish outside the room. The last day no cleaning and after 9 PM a staff member knocked on the door asking if we wanted our room cleaned. We were getting ready for bed so declined. 
The cleaning schedule is a mystery and inconvenient.
The unlocked and wide open door to our room is very concerning. Never had that happen before.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: no recommendation

reviews.title: Hotel is in good location.
reviews.positives: Good location. Friendly and helpful staff.

reviews.title: not clean and no spa
reviews.text:
when I came back and stayed there, 
they upgraded me to a suite room.
it was large, but not really clean.

and even the spa was not avaible 
as it was on the rewnewal.
reviews.positives: location.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The view from the breakfast terrace was nice.
reviews.negatives: Located right in the heart of downtown Hanoi - the beeps from the traffic going by were definitely something that we had to get used to.

reviews.title: it was the Worst experience there
reviews.text:
I had booked a room through online, 
but when I get there, the receptionist said, 
they don't have any available room then, 
and she said I had booked wrong.
I showed her my voucher, but she didn't believe me.

So.. I booked another room online one more time, as on the website, 
the hotel was still available. 

Finally she found it she was wrong,
and the owner came to explain about this situation.

the owner said they cannot refund it, 
but he will upgrade me one time. 

and he said he will book another hotel near there,
in a same condition.

as I followed him and got to the room,
it was really small, no view, no bathtub....

So I complained, and the gave me another room in that hotel.
but it was not a city view room, and even cheaper than the room I had booked.

I complained again, and he said he will give me back the diferrence amount(by vnd)
but the receptionist said, she can give the money with a bad exchange rate...
I complained one more time, and finally, the argue was over.

The reason why I complained alot was not because of the money,
I just felt bad as the staffs were rude, and not thinking that it was their fault.
They talked like it was because of my fault.

anyway it was a really terrible and tired experince.

reviews.title: Quiet and peaceful stay near the Old Quarter.
reviews.positives: Location was a few minutes walk from the Old Quarter, that means quiet streets in the evening. Breakfast has a good selection of food, even have an omelet and Pho station. We booked our Halong Bay tour with the reception, the service they used was very nice with reasonable rates. Check in and out was easy. They kept our luggage for a few hours after checkout.
reviews.negatives: Nothing that would require a mention.

reviews.text: Its new and clean but facilility had small probems such as telephone not working, smell,unusable safty box, and unreasonably expansive laundary fees. Staffs were friendly.

reviews.title: 要不是趕時間，我還想多住一晚
reviews.positives: 飯店6樓提供早餐，有自助餐，各種葷素都有，十分方便，房間我訂3人房，剛好一人一張床，床鋪軟硬適中，父母皆說難得睡得這麼舒服，也提供許多餐飲(要額外費用，看個人需求)，電視還有網路電視，可以點選台灣的網路節目觀看，飯店位於河內街道中，隔壁有河內老城街，又有古蹟可以逛，還有很多素食餐廳，也有菜市場可以找小吃
reviews.negatives: 來的時間點不對，就是太熱了

reviews.title: It was a really comfortable stay.
reviews.text: It has a relatively elegant interior and is decorated with antique colors. Considering the price, it is excellent. I had a great stay.
reviews.response: 기회에 A25 Hotel을 선택해 주시고 피드백을 공유해 주셔서 감사드립니다. 이번 여행에서 저희와 즐거운 시간을 보내셨다는 사실을 알게 되어 기쁩니다. 다시 한 번 환영해 드릴 수 있는 기회를 기대하며, 모든 환대로 모실 수 있기를 바랍니다.

reviews.title: It's a cost-effective hotel.
reviews.text: I recommend it if you're looking for a cheap accommodation, but I wouldn't suggest it for families or couples. The building is old, so cleanliness is just average, but the price is low, so three friends are staying for a night.

reviews.text: I am extremely satisfied with the communication and handling of unusual situations by the front desk staff. Other 5-star hotels may not have such professional employees.

reviews.title: Would recommend / and stay again if ever in Hanoi..
reviews.positives: Excellent breakfast with liberal hours, room large and not lacking anything. Wifi excellent, mini fridge in room well stocked.
reviews.negatives:
TV in 1  room didnt work, batteries replaced in remote, and still didnt work.
TV in second room, only available for streaming  services (not cable or any TV shows), but had Netflix ona  hotel account.

WIFI good.

reviews.title: Comfortable hotels with minimal facilities in a compact space.
reviews.text: It is within walking distance to the old town and is well located with many supermarkets and restaurants in the surrounding area. It is also a compact hotel but has a gym and good Vietnamese food.
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,
Thank you very much for sharing your feedback. We are delighted to hear that you appreciated our convenient location near the Old Town, the nearby supermarkets and restaurants, as well as our gym and Vietnamese cuisine.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for another enjoyable stay in the future.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Good location, friendly staff.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Room 501's shower faucet is not good. When the water is cold, it flows strongly, but when there's hot water, it flows weakly. It often gets blocked. The shower faucet should be replaced due to damage.
reviews.response:
Phòng Chăm sóc khách hàng phản hồi khách: 

Cảm ơn bạn đã chia sẻ trải nghiệm với chúng tôi. Chúng tôi cũng cảm ơn bạn vì đã tin tưởng sử dụng dịch vụ của khách sạn A25. Bên cạnh đó chúng tôi cũng rất xin lỗi vì trải nghiệm chưa tốt trong lần lưu trú này của bạn. Chúng tôi đã kiểm tra và khắc phục vòi nước và sức chảy của nước để không làm ảnh hưởng đến trải nghiệm của khách hàng tiếp theo. Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi không nhận thông tin sớm hơn để có thể khắc phục và cải thiện chất lượng trải nghiệm của bạn trong lần lưu trú này. Cảm ơn bạn đã dành thời gian góp ý để chúng tôi cải thiện những thiếu sót nhằm mang lại trải nghiệm tốt nhất cho khách hàng. Hy vọng chúng tôi sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp bạn trong lần lưu trú tiếp theo.

reviews.title: Should choose
reviews.text: Surrounding the hotel are many amenities to explore, suitable for staying with proximity to tourist attractions. The dining services are abundant, and there are other services that haven't been experienced yet but offer many choices.

reviews.title: Recommand to this hotel
reviews.text: Rooms are clean and reasonable price per night. Staffs are very helpful. Buffet breakfast is best for me. I would recommend to others also. But have to walk about 20 minutes to reach Hanoi Old Quarter.

reviews.title: Best staffs performance, nice room and good food
reviews.text: I was ill when I got to hotel and staffs were so nice to me they brought me a pill, ice bucket and fresh ginger tea. Breakfasts were served in my room. Nothing to complain about this hotel. The operation manager was so kind. I will come back.
reviews.positives: Best staffs performance, nice room and good food

reviews.title: Nice and helpful staff
reviews.positives: Excellant service providing information of Hanoi. Courteous front desk staff. Good location for sightseeing.

reviews.title: Lovely brand new hotel with good service.
reviews.text:
Very friendly comfortable and luxurious hotel. I was their first guest, and they were very attentive. I enjoyed the cleanliness of the hotel and the friendly staff. There are many shops and restaurants, tho I spent most of my time at the Lake. Locations isn't great, yet it does give you a taste for local culture. I enjoyed walking around. 

Also, I took many taxis, which are very cheap ($3-5). If you are happy to take taxis, then this is a very well-priced option. For the price, I found it to be very luxurious.

Only down-side was the smoking allowed in the hotel. I spoke to Management, and hopefully in time this will change to reflect global standards in clean air.
reviews.positives: New hotel, spa, clean, friendly

reviews.title: very good hotel
reviews.text: a realy wonderfull hotel at a good plce. it is on a central place, many sightseeing place near and can reach by walk. The braeckfeast buffet has a five star standard. the staff is very helps for everything. Good management is really interesting for their customers. Try it and you will not disappoited
reviews.positives: good furnished rooms, lovely staff and helpfull management

reviews.title: A home for travelling couples
reviews.text:
An excellent place to stay in DaNang, especially if you want to be closer to the Han River and the bustling city.  

The staff was wonderful, they ensured every bit of cleanliness and support.  

The view of the river is such a soothing experience to your eyes and yes the location allows you to take a walk around the market and the lovely cafe's around.

reviews.title: Tiện lợi
reviews.text:
Vị trí tốt gần danh lam thắng cảnh.
Gần các quán ăn, kể cả ăn uống vỉa hè kiểu hanoi.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn quý khách đã đánh giá! Rất vui khi biết quý khách hài lòng với vị trí thuận tiện gần các danh lam thắng cảnh và quán ăn. Mong sớm được đón tiếp quý khách quay lại!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is located in a prime location, with friendly and attentive staff. The rooms are comfortable, overall it was wonderful.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,
Chúng tôi chân thành cảm ơn quý khách đã chia sẻ đánh giá. Rất vui khi biết quý khách hài lòng với vị trí thuận tiện, sự dễ chịu và chu đáo của nhân viên, cũng như tiện nghi của phòng. Chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội đón tiếp quý khách quay lại trong thời gian tới.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The breakfast was delicious.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Convenient location for both the old town and West Lake. Friendly staff, from the valet to the receptionists. The amenities in the room are much more complete than in many other hotels. It would be better if the curtains were a bit darker.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great hospitality and front desk

reviews.title: The hotel is clean, and the services are complete.
reviews.text: Full service, amenities, close to downtown, convenient for dining, transportation,...

reviews.title: Muy bueno
reviews.text: El desayuno buffet increíble, podíamos comer todo lo que quisiéramos. La habitación tenía todo lo que necesitábamos.
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are delighted to read that you had a pleasant stay during your vacation with us. We look forward to having a chance to welcome you back so that we could serve you with our best hospitality.

reviews.title: Séjour famille
reviews.text: Rapport qualité prix ok et chambres propres à l'arrivée. Par contre, le ménage est succincts pendant le séjour : changement draps et nettoyage sanitaires uniquement. La qualité du service n'est pas à la hauteur car comme nous partions en excursions pendant 2 jours, nous avons demandé une chambre pour entreposer nos bagages. Le coût exacte n'était pas clair malgré les 6 chambres réservées avant et après l'excursion. L' une des chambres était en travaux a notre arrivée à 15h alors qu'elle était réservée pour midi. Globalement déçu par le service même si bon emplacement et bon rapport qualité prix.
reviews.response:
Nous sommes vraiment désolés pour tous les désagréments que vous avez rencontrés dans notre hôtel. Vous avez dû être très déçu pendant votre séjour.  
Nous vous remercions également sincèrement d'avoir pris le temps de partager vos commentaires afin que nous puissions immédiatement examiner nos lacunes et améliorer nos services, en nous assurant qu'ils sont à la hauteur du montant que vous payez. Nous espérons avoir l'occasion de vous accueillir à nouveau afin de pouvoir vous servir avec la plus grande hospitalité et ne vous décevoir en aucune façon.

reviews.title: Belle chambre
reviews.text: Belle grande chambre avec les enfants et téléviseur avec youtube ! Propre mais un peu a l’ecart
reviews.response: We sincerely thank you for choosing to stay at A25 and sharing with us your experiences. It's a pity that during this stay we were not able to best meet your needs for a convenient location.. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back so that we can serve you with the utmost hospitality and not disappoint you in any way.

reviews.title: Buono
reviews.text: Ci ritornerei
reviews.response: Cogliamo l’occasione per ringraziarLa per aver scelto l’A25 Hotel e per aver condiviso la Sua esperienza con noi. Siamo lieti di sapere che ha trascorso un piacevole soggiorno presso l’A25 Hotel durante il Suo viaggio.Ci auguriamo di avere presto l’opportunità di darLe nuovamente il benvenuto e di offrirLe tutta la nostra ospitalità.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Gdinh mình đi có trẻ nhỏ, đặt phòng trên app 1 hình, nhận phòng 1 hình, nhà wc rất bẩn, trên mặt bồn cầu còn vương nước bẩn từ trước. Khi xả nước thì nắp cống rung bần bật. Gọi điện xuống cho nhân viên phản ánh yêu cầu đổi phòng vì phòng bé không giống loại mình đặt trên app thì nhân viên báo không còn phòng không đổi. Vì nhà mình đi có con nhỏ nên ưu tiên sạch sẽ, mình quyết định check out ngay đổi ksan, lúc đấy bạn nvien mới bảo đổi phòng cho mình sang phòng khác nhưng mình đã từ chối vì quá bực mình. Đối với giá tiền 7-800k/đêm với phòng như thế, mình thấy không xứng đáng. Sẽ không có lần sau.

reviews.title: God hotell med god pris
reviews.text: Vi foretok en gruppereise, og har bodd i hotellet tidligere. Like fornøyd som før.

reviews.title: blízkost centra a nákupů pěšky
reviews.text:
pobyt byl celkem dobrý vzhledem k umístění nedaleko centra metropole, pobýval jsem při příletu a odletu ze země, dobrá docházková vzdálenost na starý trh a do centra města,
blízkost banky ke směně peněz, vybavenost pokojů postačující, vyšší cena za ubytování,
v době mé návštěvy se opravovala restaurace, personál slušný a usměvavý
reviews.positives: ubytování ve vyšších patrech ke klidnějšímu spánku, blízkost nákupních možností, naproti banka na výměnu peněz

reviews.title: My regular hotel
reviews.text:
Clean quiet room with spacious toilet.
Staff at counter speak English.  Hotel have parking areas for motor cycles. Comprehensive buffet breakfast, good and delicious.
